living-abstract.essence: Understand system dynamics through component analysis and feedback identification
living-abstract.purpose: Reveal how systems behave through interactions, loops, and emergent properties
living-abstract.ability: Identify system parts and their relationships
Follow data, control, and event flows through system
Identify reinforcing and balancing feedback loops
living-abstract.principle: System behavior emerges from interactions, not just components
Where you draw the system boundary changes what you see
How a system responds reveals its true architecture
